package models

import (
	"time"
)

// Positive scenario for persistence_model_contains_http_form_or_uri_tags.
// Anti-pattern: Domain/persistence model carries HTTP-specific tags
// (form, uri, binding) that belong only in the transport layer.

type Order struct {
	ID         uint      `gorm:"primaryKey" json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
	CustomerID uint      `gorm:"column:customer_id" json:"customer_id" form:"customer_id" binding:"required"`
	ProductID  uint      `gorm:"column:product_id" json:"product_id" form:"product_id" binding:"required"`
	Quantity   int       `gorm:"column:quantity" json:"quantity" form:"quantity" binding:"required"`
	Status     string    `gorm:"column:status;default:'pending'" json:"status" form:"status"`
	TotalPrice float64   `gorm:"column:total_price" json:"total_price" form:"total_price"`
	Notes      string    `gorm:"column:notes" json:"notes" form:"notes"`
	CreatedAt  time.Time `gorm:"column:created_at" json:"created_at" form:"created_at"`
	UpdatedAt  time.Time `gorm:"column:updated_at" json:"updated_at" form:"updated_at"`
}

func (Order) TableName() string {
	return "orders"
}
